item.title: First reading, referred to Capital Budget.
item.description: First reading, referred to Capital Budget.

item.title: The Week Ahead: January 26-30, 2026 | Washington State House Republicans
item.description: News article "The Week Ahead: January 26-30, 2026 | Washington State House Republicans" from House Republicans.

item.title: 👍John McClellan - Alderwood Water & Wastewater District
item.description: John McClellan signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Alderwood Water & Wastewater District.

item.title: 👍Steve DuPont - Alderwood Water & Wastewater District
item.description: Steve DuPont signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍💵James Cockburn - Washington Public Ports Association
item.description: James Cockburn signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Public Ports Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Steven Ellis - Association of Washington Cities
item.description: Steven Ellis signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Cities. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Axel Swanson - Washington State Association of Counties
item.description: Axel Swanson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association of Counties. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Michael Transue - Mechanical Contractors Ass'n of Western Washington
item.description: Michael Transue signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Mechanical Contractors Ass'n of Western Washington. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: CB - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: CB - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: CB - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.
item.description: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: 1st substitute bill substituted.
item.description: 1st substitute bill substituted.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 94; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 4.

item.title: 👍Steve DuPont - Central Washington University
item.description: Steve DuPont signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Central Washington University.

item.title: 👍💵Michael Transue - Mechanical Contractors Association of Western Washington
item.description: Michael Transue signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Mechanical Contractors Association of Western Washington. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: SGTE - Majority; do pass.
